note: usedBy line-evidence harvested by wordwise grep -rn over repos/core/skills/ (T026 part b, snapshot 2026-07-10). Every key is a member of tool-inventory.json (the 42-tool snapshot).
playwrightNote: Playwright-MCP (browser_*) is used by memo-rollout (Werkzeug-Check), memo-rollout-evaluate:151/527 (UI-check, degrades to SKIPPED when absent), research-scrape-docs:88-89 and image-pencil-playwright-diff:46-47. It is CONDITIONAL (critical only for UI memos, when-axis memo-finalize:516-517). It is NOT keyed in tools[] because browser_* are MCP tools, not entries of the 42-tool harness inventory.

TaskCreate.criticalNote: Task-hierarchy is a mandatory orchestrator step (14 skill files). Absence is degraded state-file-first (state.json carries recovery), so the probe treats it as gate-dependent, not a hard stop.

TaskUpdate.criticalNote: The status machine of phases/PRDs (8 skill files). Same gate-dependent degradation as TaskCreate.

Bash.criticalNote: The whole execution — worktrees, gates, git. Layer-A deterministically checkable.

SendMessage.criticalNote: Agent-team communication; the only resume path since v2.1.77.

Skill.criticalNote: The skill chain IS the pipeline (Generate/Execute/Evaluate).

Read.criticalNote: Implicit in every step (read memos, PRDs, revisions). ANNAHME — never named as a harness tool but factually required.

Write.criticalNote: Implicit in every step (write revisions/PRDs/reports). ANNAHME.

Edit.criticalNote: Implicit in every step (targeted edits). ANNAHME.

WebFetch.criticalNote: Research/memo phase, not the rollout Stage 1.

ToolSearch.criticalNote: 0 hits in repos/core/skills/ before this memo; it becomes the carrier of the Layer-B pre-flight probe (PRD-009).
